issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttachedDon' (when DON!! is given to your Leader or Character), not 'Activated'
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' (text says 'during this turn'), not 'EndOfTurn'
PowerBoost amount of -1000 is unconventional; standard cost reduction is typically -1 (or -100 if using cost units). Verify card intent; likely should be -1 or -100

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] When this Leader or any of your Characters is given a DON!! card, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 7 or less −1 cost during this turn.
